description: Dashboard frontend hardening: fix XSS in signals.html removeTicker, add interval cleanup on page unload, fix hardcoded ports, add ARIA labels, add fetch error handling for API calls, fix memory leak in health check interval
steps: In dashboard/templates/signals.html: the removeTicker function uses string concatenation with ticker in onclick handler - fix by escaping the ticker with escapeHtml() or use data attributes instead of inline onclick with string interpolation to prevent XSS via malicious ticker names stored in watchlist
In dashboard/templates/signals.html: add cleanup for autoRefreshTimer on page unload using window.addEventListener('beforeunload', ...) or document visibilitychange to pause when tab hidden

In dashboard/templates/base.html: the health check setInterval(checkHealth, 30000) never gets cleaned up and has no error state recovery - add visibility API support to pause polling when page is hidden

In dashboard/templates/stocks.html: the exportJSON function creates an object URL but only revokes it immediately after click - this is fine but verify the blob is GC'd. More importantly, the renderResults function uses renderMarkdown for reasoning which does NOT escape HTML for trusted backend content (documented in comment), but agent_name is user-provided for custom personas - wrap agent_name in escapeHtml() in the grid rendering

In dashboard/templates/index.html: heroGo() error handler shows err.message directly via textContent (safe), but the hero-error-msg should also handle non-Error objects (e.g., if JSON parse fails) - add fallback

In dashboard/templates/backtest.html: the runBacktest async function lacks a finally block for btn state reset if the response JSON parsing fails - wrap in try/catch properly (already has try/finally but check fetch error paths)
In all templates: add aria-label attributes to interactive buttons that only have icon content (hamburger, sidebar collapse, remove ticker X button, expand/collapse buttons)
acceptance_criteria: removeTicker in signals.html uses safe escaping for ticker values in onclick handlers
autoRefreshTimer is cleaned up or paused when page is hidden/unloaded
Health check polling pauses when page is not visible (Page Visibility API)
Agent names from custom personas are escaped with escapeHtml() before innerHTML insertion in stocks.html
Key interactive buttons have aria-label attributes for accessibility
python -m pytest tests/ -q passes with no regressions
